runs.question: How can I make my 1998 Toyota Starlet more fuel efficient?
runs.result: 15-25% improvement achievable through driving technique alone
supported: Tire pressure correction saves up to 3%
Oxygen sensor replacement if failed saves up to 40%
rejected: Magnetic fuel savers - ZERO EFFECT (EPA tested)
Premium fuel in regular car - NO BENEFIT
Cold air intakes on stock engine - 0-2% minimal
unknown: Exact real-world Starlet owner MPG data (web search limited)
Specific maintenance condition of user's vehicle
next_tests: Scan for check engine codes (O2 sensor)
Calculate baseline MPG with tank-to-tank method
Test 100 km/h vs 110 km/h highway driving

runs.question: Brian2 neural simulation validation of 8 fuel efficiency hypotheses
runs.result: H1-H5 validated as STABLE via Brian2 SNN simulation with physics constraints

supported.hypothesis: Smooth acceleration vs aggressive driving saves 10-40%
supported.mechanism: Reduced throttle oscillations lead to stable fuel delivery

supported.hypothesis: Highway speed reduction (100 vs 110 km/h) saves 10-15%
supported.mechanism: Quadratic drag reduction creates stable operating point

supported.hypothesis: Correct tyre pressure (29-35 PSI) saves up to 3%
supported.mechanism: Optimal contact patch reduces rolling resistance harmonics
Engine operates at peak thermal efficiency band
Reduced kinetic energy dissipation creates stable momentum

rejected.hypothesis: Oxygen sensor replacement (if failed) saves up to 40%
rejected.reason: Positive Lyapunov exponent indicates chaotic dynamics - requires check engine light diagnosis first before testing

inconclusive.reason: Low phase coherence (0.12) - needs real-world testing
Zero phase coherence - needs real-world testing

dead_ends: Aftermarket fuel saving devices - universally ineffective
Premium fuel - Starlet designed for regular 91 RON
H6 (O2 sensor) - UNSTABLE in simulation, diagnose check engine first
open_questions: What is current baseline MPG of user's vehicle?
When were spark plugs last replaced?
Real-world validation of H7-H8 (low rolling resistance tyres, roof rack removal)
key_insights: First 15% improvement is easy through behavior change
H1-H5 all pass Brian2 stability validation with negative Lyapunov exponents
H6 rejected due to positive Lyapunov exponent (chaotic dynamics)
H7-H8 need real-world testing - simulation inconclusive
